subject: feat(map): auto-zoom map to match search radius selection
body:
Map zoom level now automatically adjusts when the user changes the
distance filter. A 5 km radius zooms in to level 13, while 50 km
zooms out to level 9. This makes the visible map area correlate
with the search distance, so users see roughly the area being searched.

Tags: map, ux, filters
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: map-ux
Semver: minor
